_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: The authors used DNA microarrays to profile the gene expression in normal Schwann cells, Schwann cells cultured from primary benign neurofibromas
details: DNA microarrays successfully profiled gene expression in normal Schwann cells, neurofibroma cells, and MPNST cell lines and tumours
